# `api.lookup.get_document_types`

> `GET /lookup/documentTypes` — ACPortal

**Python**

```python
api.lookup.get_document_types(*, document_source: Optional[str] = None) -> list[DocumentTypeBySource]
```

**CLI**

```bash
ab lookup get_document_types [--document-source ...]
```

GET /lookup/documentTypes

Args:
    document_source: Optional document source filter.

## Query parameters — `LookupDocumentTypesParams`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `documentSource` | `Optional[str]` | no | Document source filter |

## Response

Returns a list of `List[DocumentTypeBySource]`.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | `Optional[str]` | no | Document type name |
| `value` | `Optional[int]` | no | Document type value |
| `documentSource` | `Optional[int]` | no | Document source |
